name: Refreshing Tropical Fruit (with No Oil Dressing)
recipeIngredient: 15 1/4 oz DOLE Tropical Fruit Salad, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the syrup, grated lime peel, and lime juice.
If desired, add minced candied ginger, poppy seeds, or toasted sesame seeds.
2. Pour the mixture over the fruit.
